name: layerflow-monorepo
description: Headless presentation orchestration for React, React Native, and Expo.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @yonas-valentin-dev/layerflow-core && npm run build -w @yonas-valentin-dev/layerflow-react && npm run build -w @yonas-valentin-dev/layerflow-react-native && npm run build -w @yonas-valentin-dev/layerflow-expo-ui && npm run build -w @yonas-valentin-dev/layerflow-gorhom && npm run build -w @yonas-valentin-dev/layerflow-testing
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --pretty false && tsc -p examples/expo-app/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.check: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run build && npm run pack:dry-run
